siteContent.heroSubtitle: Luxury real estate development across California's most coveted addresses.
siteContent.aboutText: Orgho Development Group is a boutique real estate development firm specializing in architecturally significant residential and mixed-use properties across California. With over two decades of experience, we transform prime locations into landmark addresses that redefine luxury living.

properties.title: Malibu Cliffside Residences

heroImage.altText: Malibu Cliffside Residences overlooking the Pacific Ocean

gallery.altText: Exterior view of Malibu residence at dusk
Open-plan living room with ocean views

properties.description: Perched above the Pacific on a private cliff face, Malibu Cliffside Residences represents the pinnacle of California coastal living. Six ensuite bedrooms flow through an open-plan architecture of board-form concrete and floor-to-ceiling glass. A seamless indoor-outdoor living experience, with an infinity pool cantilevered over the ocean and a private beach path.

properties.title: Bel Air Modern Estate

heroImage.altText: Bel Air Modern Estate aerial view

gallery.altText: Front facade of Bel Air Estate

properties.description: Set on over an acre in the exclusive Bel Air hillside, this 12,400-square-foot estate commands panoramic views of the Los Angeles basin. The architect-designed residence features a dramatic double-height entry, a professional chef's kitchen, wine cellar, home theater, spa, and a resort-worthy pool terrace surrounded by mature olive groves.

properties.title: Santa Barbara Vineyard Compound

heroImage.altText: Santa Barbara vineyard compound at golden hour

gallery.altText: Courtyard with fountain and mature landscaping

properties.description: A private compound spanning eight acres of working vineyard in the Santa Ynez foothills. The main residence pays homage to the region's Spanish-Colonial heritage with arched loggias, terracotta roofing, and hand-laid Saltillo tile — reinterpreted with thoroughly modern interiors. Includes a 3-acre Pinot Noir vineyard, guest casita, and 3-car garage with wine cellar.

properties.title: Silver Lake Glass Pavilion

heroImage.altText: Silver Lake Glass Pavilion architectural rendering

properties.description: An upcoming architectural statement in Silver Lake's most coveted hillside pocket. The design centers on a single transparent volume of structural glass and weathered steel, positioned to maximize the iconic reservoir views. Currently in entitlement phase — projected delivery Q3 2026. Early interest contact available.
